description: M4 audit finding F3 (issue #405): registering the Data profile's own primitives must not make every name visible — a genuinely unknown callee (`frobnicate`) is still flagged `ol-unknown-command` with the `data` profile active, exactly as it is under any other profile set.

diagnostics.message: i don't know how to frobnicate. check the spelling, or define it with 'define'.
